name: @broberg/stripe
description: The fleet's one Stripe chokepoint — a dark-ship client factory (pinned apiVersion), a Connect destination-charge Checkout builder (application_fee + on_behalf_of + transfer_data + metadata.kind), an injected fee calculator, and a raw-body webhook handler/route factory (constructEvent + dispatch-by-type). One pinned Stripe SDK, one signature-verification path for every @broberg/* app.
peerDependenciesComment: stripe is a peer so the consumer pins ONE Stripe SDK version shared across the whole app (same reasoning as @broberg/auth pinning better-auth). The /next subpath uses only the Web-standard Request/Response globals — no next import — so it also runs under Hono, Bun and edge runtimes.
